steps.name: project-and-types
steps.summary: pyproject.toml, Makefile, directory skeleton, core types (RiskTier/ProductManifest/RiskProfile/Finding/RiskReport/GateDecision), config parsers with JSON Schema validation, fixture YAMLs, 18 tests passing

steps.name: controls-repo
steps.summary: 12 OSCAL controls (PCI-DSS 5, ASVS 4, FISC 3), tier-mappings.yaml, ControlsRepository class, select_baseline function, Control/VerificationMethod models, 14 new tests (32 total passing)

steps.name: scanner-integration
steps.summary: Scanner Protocol, ControlMapper (verification_methods→Control ID), 4 scanner wrappers (Checkov/Semgrep/Grype/Gitleaks), ScannerRunner with log-and-continue failure policy, 4 fixture files, 27 new tests (59 total passing)
